assertions.assertion: Program.cs contains 'LoadFromMemory' with RouteConfig and ClusterConfig
assertions.rationale: Shows .LoadFromMemory with RouteConfig and ClusterConfig including route match and cluster destinations

assertions.assertion: Program.cs contains '.WithAccessToken(TokenType.User)' on the RouteConfig (YARP uses TokenType, not RequiredTokenType)
assertions.rationale: Uses .WithAccessToken(RequiredTokenType.User) instead of the correct YARP-specific TokenType.User. YARP routes require TokenType, not RequiredTokenType.
Does not use .WithAntiforgeryCheck() on the RouteConfig. Relies on general BFF middleware instead.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs contains 'MapReverseProxy' with a pipeline that calls 'UseAntiforgeryCheck()'
assertions.rationale: Shows app.MapReverseProxy() without a pipeline delegate — does not call UseAntiforgeryCheck()
